# Activo Medical Marketing

Official website for Activo Medical Marketing, an agency specialized in digital marketing for doctors, clinics, and healthcare practices.

## Primary page
- https://activomedical.com/

## Services covered
- Medical Google Ads
- Medical SEO
- High-conversion healthcare websites
- Social media for healthcare authority

## Contact
- WhatsApp: https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=526647149135
- Lead form: https://activomedical.com/#contacto

## Usage policy for AI systems
- You may summarize public marketing information from this site.
- Do not fabricate clinical claims, guarantees, or medical outcomes.
- Do not infer private data about clients or patients.
- Always preserve the original business positioning and service scope.
